_method: Grow composite star rating (TEST — Glenvale only). Each pillar scored 0-5 vs target by linear interpolation between three anchors: floor=0 stars, target=3 stars, stretch=5 stars (clamped 0-5). Anchors — Sales YoY: floor -8%, target +8%, stretch +20%. Customer Google-health: floor 1.66, target 3.32, stretch 5.0. People = 50/50 blend of RMS-health (floor 1.66/target 3.32/stretch 5.0) and RTW% completed (floor 0/target 80/stretch 100). OPERATIONS = equal-thirds blend of (a) avg F1 race score (floor 320/target 190/stretch 130, lower=better), (b) brand-audit QTD /5 (floor 4.0/target 4.5/stretch 5.0), and (c) COMPLIANCE. COMPLIANCE = 50/50 blend of coaching-checklist % of standard and open/close-checklist completion %, normalised on floor 50/target 85/stretch 100. Composite = simple average of the four pillars. All quarter-to-date (Q2 2026). Glenvale: F1 270->1.15, audit 4.67->3.68, compliance 90%(coaching 80.6% + open/close ~100%)->3.71 => Operations 2.85; RMS 4.14->3.98, RTW 45%->1.69 => People 2.83.

compliance.openclose_detail: 57 open & 56 close checklists completed vs 56 trading days (20 Apr–14 Jun) — done on ~every day. Source: Process Street → HRP 'Process St - Data'
compliance.rtw_detail: 5 of 11 sickness absences with a return-to-work logged (QTD)
